title: HL7-PET PATH Conformance Vector
description: Schema for a single conformance vector as defined by spec 001-path-grammar-spec FR-011. Consumed programmatically by spec 003 (regression-suite) when vectors are promoted into the shared fixtures/ corpus.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for this vector within the whole suite, e.g. "path-001". Used for cross-referencing by later specs (e.g. 1000, 1001 reusing this spec's line-number metadata).

path.description: The PATH expression under test, exactly as a caller would pass it (e.g. "OBX[2]-5.1").

message_ref.description: Relative path (from this spec's directory) to the synthetic source HL7 message file this vector is evaluated against. MUST point to a message satisfying FR-009 (no real patient data).

method.description: Which extraction method/variant this vector exercises.

expected.description: Expected result. For getValue: a two-dimensional array (outer = segment occurrences, inner = field repetitions), per spec FR-004. For getFirstValue: a single string, or null if no match. For a syntactically invalid path (FR-012): the literal string "INVALID".

expected_lines.description: 1-based source line number for each value in `expected`, mirroring its shape (FR-008). Omitted for invalid-PATH vectors, since no value is extracted.

grammar_productions.description: Which grammar production(s) from spec FR-001 this vector exercises (drives SC-003 coverage tracking). For invalid vectors, names the production(s) whose constraint is violated.

known_limitation.description: Name of the SPEC.md §7 Known Limitation this vector demonstrates, if any.
